reviews.comment:
Exelente...amo santa clara del mar...mi playa preferida....y la rotonda con parque de diversiones,espectáculos gratis todos los días,ferias,comidas típicas de cada provincias,restaurantes,havana,peatonal y muchoooooo más...🤗😁👏👏👏👏👏👏

(Translated by Google)
Excellent...I love Santa Clara del Mar...my favorite beach....and the roundabout with the amusement park, free shows every day, fairs, typical food from each province, restaurants, Havana, pedestrian area and much more...🤗😁👏👏👏👏👏👏
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMmFXMEJREAE
